Brand IdentityIllustrationCase StudiesAboutStart Project

First Published Illustration Assignment

Albo Finds a Home

Created for author Dennis R. LaPoole, this project became my first published illustration assignment. The characters, environments and finished artwork combined traditional drawing, watercolor and digital enhancement.

From drawing to print

The project began with detailed pencil drawings and developed into finished watercolor illustrations prepared for publication.

The published book

The final cover brought the characters and the Louisiana inspired world together into a complete printed story.
